note: Each case is a record fragment plus the verdict a conforming reader must reproduce. Verdicts: declared (a recognized source class is present), declared_unknown (the record types its basis as not established, or carries a value the reader does not recognize and folds down), undeclared (the record's vocabulary cannot carry a basis, or the field is absent), invalid (a structural rule is broken). The dialect-shaped records are minimal fragments written for this corpus in the shape of each vocabulary.

record.coverage_boundary: mcp-proxy: all tools/call via this gateway

notes: chokepoint vantage: the claim is scoped by the declared boundary and says nothing about paths that bypass it
the record told the reader its basis is not established; compare undeclared-bare-outcome, which told the reader nothing
fail-closed fold: an unrecognized source class is reported as typed unknown, never guessed at, never an error

a digest must travel with the canonicalization id that produced it; two readers with different implicit canonicalizations derive different bytes for the same record and cannot tell whose reading was meant
an honest typed unknown, carried in the producer's own vocabulary; the anchored time_basis raises tamper-evidence in time, not vantage
the anchor proves the timestamp predates the outcome; the outcome beside it remains a report by whoever wrote it, and this vocabulary has no field to say who that was
FRESH re-derives the source document's bytes; it does not say who observed what the decision did
three different mechanisms produce this identical record: a gateway refusal, a runtime deny branch, an external monitor; nothing in the record separates them
an untyped per-vendor dict is outside what a neutral reader can grade; a basis only counts when it is carried in a typed field the contract owns

record.observer: kernel tracepoint, host-owned, not writable by the observed process
record.coverage_boundary: connect(2) and openat(2) for cgroup abc123

notes: the strongest class for effect claims and still bounded: it covers the declared boundary only, and proves nothing about authorized refusals, which leave no effect to observe
